subcodes.first_line: O thou who art intoxicated with the cup of pre-existence! This is the time for remembrance and praise, and the day of utterance and call, and seeking aid from the All-Glorious Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرمست جام الست وقت ذکر و ثناست و روز نطق و ندا و استمداد از جمال ابهی
subcodes.subjects: @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @spiritual transformation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
